entities.description: As a subsection of '1硬件资源', this section outlines the peripheral resources included on the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board, such as CPU, ROM, RAM, crystal oscillator, power supply, LED, and other hardware components.
Refers to the central processing unit included as a hardware resource in the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board.
Refers to the read-only memory included as a hardware resource in the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board.
Refers to the random-access memory included as a hardware resource in the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board.
Refers to the crystal oscillator included as a hardware resource in the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board.
Refers to the power supply components included as a hardware resource in the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board.
Refers to the light-emitting diode components included as a hardware resource in the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board.
